title: Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced RL Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Advanced RL Techniques. Start after Reinforcement Learning Algorithms and Deep Learning. It opens into Deep Reinforcement Meta-Learning and Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL).

related: Reinforcement Learning Algorithms (e.g., Q-Learning, SARSA, DQN)
